Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: A school announcement, news update, or activity published by administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier of the announcement document.

title.description: Title or headline of the announcement.

content.description: Detailed text body of the announcement.

imageUrl.description: An optional external URL of an associated photo.

category.description: Category of update (e.g. News, Event, TVET, Admission).

publisherName.description: Name of the administrator who published it.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the announcement was posted.

Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: An inquiry message filled out by a visitor in the contact form.

status.description: Admin review state of the message.

/announcements/{announcementId}.description: Collection of published school updates, news, and activities.

/inquiries/{inquiryId}.description: Visitor contact inquiries and school registration requests.
